result.summary: IFTTT exposes two developer HTTP surfaces: the Service API for IFTTT-to-your-service integrations (OAuth2-based, docs only; spec URL not publicly machine-readable) and the Connect API at https://connect.ifttt.com, which supports unauthenticated public reads and authenticated backend calls via the `IFTTT-Service-Key` header.

ifttt_service_key.label: IFTTT Service Key
ifttt_service_key.setup: Open the [IFTTT Platform API tab](https://ifttt.com/mkt/api) for your service and copy the **Service Key**. Use it as the `IFTTT-Service-Key` header when calling the Connect API from your backend.
